# OutfitKit
> CSS component library + Jinja macros for server-rendered web apps. Zero JS required, zero build pipeline for consumers.

OutfitKit ships ~260 semantic blocks (BEM-light, themeable via CSS custom properties) as both a single-`<link>` CSS bundle and a `pip install outfitkit` package of Jinja2 macros that render the same markup. Every macro file is dual-mode: it works as a vanilla `{% from "ui/x.jinja" import x %}` import AND as a JinjaX `<X />` tag from the same file.

## Quick start
- [README](https://github.com/OutfitKit/outfitkit/blob/main/README.md): install + usage for CSS-only and Python+Jinja.
- [Live showcase](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/): every component, Preview / HTML / Jinja / JinjaX / Usage tabs.
- [Repository](https://github.com/OutfitKit/outfitkit): source, issues, releases.
- [Design system](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/design-system.html): tokens, themes, scales.

## CSS bundles (jsDelivr)
- [outfitkit.min.css (default, no prefix)](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/OutfitKit/outfitkit@latest/dist/outfitkit.min.css): Use when OutfitKit is the only CSS lib. Classes: `.btn`, `.card`, `.modal`.
- [outfitkit.ok.min.css (opt-in, `ok-` prefix)](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/OutfitKit/outfitkit@latest/dist/outfitkit.ok.min.css): Use only to avoid name collisions with Bootstrap / Tailwind / legacy DS. Classes: `.ok-btn`, `.ok-card`.
- [outfitkit.css (unminified dev source, always `ok-` prefix)](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/OutfitKit/outfitkit@main/css/outfitkit.css): For DevTools inspection.
- Both bundles share identical tokens, keyframes, and animations — only selector names differ.

## Python package
- [outfitkit on PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/outfitkit/): `pip install outfitkit` (vanilla) or `pip install outfitkit[jinjax]` (HTML-tag syntax).
- [Package source](https://github.com/OutfitKit/outfitkit/tree/main/showcase/src/outfitkit): exposes `TEMPLATES_DIR`, `register_globals(env, ok_prefix="")`, `css_url(version=None, minified=True, prefix="")`, `theme_url(name)`.
- Setup snippet:
  ```python
  from jinja2 import Environment, FileSystemLoader
  from outfitkit import TEMPLATES_DIR, register_globals, css_url
  env = Environment(loader=FileSystemLoader(TEMPLATES_DIR))
  register_globals(env)            # default: no prefix
  ctx = {"css": css_url()}         # → outfitkit.min.css
  ```
- Rule of thumb: the macro `ok_prefix` and the loaded CSS bundle MUST match. Both default to "".

## Components

All component pages live at `https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/<name>.html`.

- Buttons & status: [button](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/button.html), [badge](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/badge.html), [avatar](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/avatar.html), [icon](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/icon.html), [tags](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/tags.html), [progress](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/progress.html), [rating](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/rating.html).
- Surfaces & layout: [card](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/card.html), [panel](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/panel.html), [app-shell](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/app_shell.html), [mobile-shell](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/mobile_shell.html), [sidebar-nav](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/sidebar_nav.html), [topbar](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/topbar.html), [menubar](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/menubar.html), [tabbar](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/tabbar.html), [tabs](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/tabs.html), [breadcrumbs](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/breadcrumbs.html), [accordion](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/accordion.html).
- Overlays: [modal](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/modal.html), [drawer](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/drawer.html), [toast](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/toast.html), [banner](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/banner.html), [tooltip](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/tooltip.html), [context-menu](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/context_menu.html), [system-overlays](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/system_overlays.html).
- Data: [table](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/table.html), [datatable](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/datatable.html), [list](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/list.html), [tree](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/tree.html), [timeline](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/timeline.html), [stat](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/stat.html), [stats](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/stats.html), [kpi](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/kpi.html), [chart](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/chart.html), [sparkline](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/sparkline.html), [empty](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/empty.html), [states](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/states.html).
- Forms: [field](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/field.html), [input](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/input.html), [textarea](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/textarea.html), [select](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/select.html), [checkbox](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/checkbox.html), [radio](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/radio.html), [toggle](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/toggle.html), [slider](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/slider.html), [search](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/search.html), [autocomplete](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/autocomplete.html), [datepicker](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/datepicker.html), [timepicker](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/timepicker.html), [colorpicker](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/colorpicker.html), [otp](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/otp.html), [stepper](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/stepper.html), [richtext](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/richtext.html).
- Verticals: [calendar](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/calendar.html), [kanban](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/kanban.html), [chat](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/chat.html), [pos](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/pos.html), [kds](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/kds.html), [numpad](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/numpad.html), [pinpad](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/pinpad.html), [pay](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/pay.html), [invoice](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/invoice.html), [receipt](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/receipt.html), [manufacturing](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/manufacturing.html), [hr-card](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/hr_card.html), [gallery](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/gallery.html), [audio-player](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/audio_player.html), [video-player](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/components/video_player.html).

## Macros API
- [Macros directory](https://github.com/OutfitKit/outfitkit/tree/main/showcase/src/outfitkit/templates/ui): 69 `.jinja` files. Each is dual-mode (vanilla `{% macro %}` + JinjaX `{#def #}` header) and renders identical HTML in either mode.
- Every macro accepts `attrs=None` (a dict of extra HTML attributes) and emits class names prefixed with the global `ok_prefix` set via `register_globals`.

## Themes
- [Tokens source](https://github.com/OutfitKit/outfitkit/blob/main/css/tokens.css): all design tokens are CSS custom properties named `--ok-*` (paleta, spacing, radii, shadows, typography).
- Themes apply via `data-theme` on `<html>` or any subtree: `erplora` (default, dark terracota), `dark`, `light`. Override any `--ok-*` variable to make your own.
- [Corporate theme override](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/OutfitKit/outfitkit@latest/css/themes/corporate.css): example single-file theme.

## Optional
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/OutfitKit/outfitkit/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release notes per version.
- [llms-full.txt](https://outfitkit.github.io/outfitkit/llms-full.txt): expanded reference with macro signatures, prefix decision matrix, and copy-paste patterns.
